settings.text: From a single room refresh to a full home transformation, we design spaces that work for the way you live.

settings.title: Explore a Living Room Design
settings.description: Tap any pin to see the design choices behind this space.
settings.image_alt: Hue and Co designed living room with curated furniture and lighting

settings.title: Custom Sofa
settings.description: A deep-seated linen sofa in warm oatmeal, built to order with down-blend cushions and solid oak legs. Designed for comfort and longevity.

settings.title: Pendant Lighting
settings.description: Hand-blown glass pendants from a local Portland glassblower. Warm-toned bulbs set to 2700K for a cozy ambient glow.

settings.title: Wall Treatment
settings.description: Limewash finish in a muted sage, applied by hand for natural texture variation. Pairs with the warm oak flooring and brass hardware.

settings.title: Vintage Rug
settings.description: A hand-knotted Turkish rug sourced from our partner dealers. The faded terracotta and cream tones anchor the room's color palette.

settings.text: Every project follows the same four-phase framework, adapted to your scope, timeline, and budget.

settings.title: Discovery
settings.description: We visit your space, discuss your vision, and establish the project scope. This consultation is always complimentary.

settings.title: Concept
settings.description: Mood boards, material palettes, and space plans. We present two to three directions and refine until the vision clicks.

settings.title: Procurement
settings.description: We source furniture, fixtures, textiles, and art from our network of trade-only vendors and local artisans.

settings.title: Installation
settings.description: Our team coordinates delivery, placement, and final styling. We don't leave until every detail is right.

settings.text: We believe in transparent pricing. Every project begins with a complimentary consultation, after which we provide a detailed proposal with fixed design fees and estimated procurement budgets.

settings.features:
+ Complimentary initial consultation
+ Fixed design fees — no hourly surprises
+ Trade pricing on all furnishings
+ Flexible payment milestones

settings.question: How long does a typical project take?
settings.answer: A single room refresh takes 6-8 weeks from concept to installation. Full home interiors typically run 4-6 months depending on scope, custom fabrication, and procurement timelines. We provide a detailed schedule at the start of every project.

settings.question: Do you work with existing furniture?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We love blending existing pieces with new selections. During discovery we'll identify which items to keep, reupholster, or replace. There's no requirement to start from scratch.

settings.question: What's included in the design fee?
settings.answer: Design fees cover all creative work: space planning, concept development, material selections, vendor coordination, procurement management, and installation styling. Furnishing and material costs are separate and quoted transparently.

settings.question: Do you handle renovations and construction?
settings.answer: We partner with trusted general contractors for structural work, but our focus is design. We manage paint, wallpaper, window treatments, lighting, and all furnishing selections. For renovation projects, we coordinate closely with your contractor.

settings.question: Can I purchase items on my own?
settings.answer: We recommend letting us handle procurement since we have access to trade-only pricing that's typically 20-40% below retail. However, we're flexible and happy to incorporate pieces you've sourced yourself.
